name: The Greens Golf Lounge
about: The Greens Golf Lounge is a golf simulator venue located in Caldwell, NJ, offering year-round play regardless of weather conditions. They feature state-of-the-art simulators with high-speed camera sensors for immediate feedback, along with a moving swing plate and multi-surface hitting mat to replicate real-course lies. The venue is known for its community-focused environment, BYOB policy, and active leagues for couples and flexible teams. Patrons can book by the hour through packages or walk-in rates, with early bird specials available on weekdays. The facility also provides private event hosting options and personalized coaching services from a swing coach who offers playing lessons, short game work, and club fitting.
why_golfers_like_it: High-speed camera sensors provide immediate and accurate feedback on every shot
Moving swing plate with up to 6,800 possible lies for the most realistic simulation experience
BYOB policy allows players to enjoy their own beverages while playing
Active leagues and events cater to various skill levels and social play
Community-focused environment with a welcoming atmosphere for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB policy allowed; bring your own beer, wine, or soda

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, clubs are not mentioned as required; the facility provides all necessary equipment for simulation.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, The Greens Golf Lounge has a BYOB policy, allowing you to bring your own beer, wine, or non-alcoholic beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18-hole rounds typically take 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, kids under 16 are welcome but must be accompanied by an adult. The facility offers a family-friendly environment with leagues and events suitable for various skill levels.
